per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Feedback was somewhat specific but could have been clearer in addressing all critical issues.
Guidance was generally appropriate but missed some critical aspects like data stratification and broader post-hoc analysis.
Improvement was limited due to premature marking of 'done' and unresolved critical issues.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding in iterative improvement, missing critical issues and prematurely marking tasks as complete.
